description: Field-based meter reading role covering residential and commercial sites across Brisbane. Working independently in a fast-paced, high-accountability environment with consistent daily targets.
Delivered high-volume bar service in fast-paced hospitality venues. Developed strong customer-facing communication skills and the ability to perform calmly under pressure.

Completed a Bachelor of IT with a major in Computer Science and minors in Data and Cloud Computing. Built full-stack applications, explored blockchain technology, and completed a capstone project delivering a production-ready backend system.
